summary: Executed the three deterministic debug-hook checks on the 3-style cube trainer. All checks passed: hooks defined, movement responds, and markSolved does not unsolve on re-feed of prior scramble state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Debug hooks window.__trainer (feedFacelets, markSolved, getState) and window.__cube (SOLVED, applyMove, applyAlg, scramble) are exposed on the trainer page and function correctly. Both reported bugs are FIXED.
